title: Verify the welcome screen displays correctly
test_steps: Open the Cleveland Browns mobile app. | Verify the status bar shows the time as 7:52 and various system icons. | Verify the promotional image of a Cleveland Browns coach is displayed. | Verify the navigation bar with icons for "Latest," "Social," "Fan Zone," "Schedule," and "Tickets" is positioned below the image. | Verify the section labeled "Latest Media - August 25, 2016" displays a thumbnail of a video titled "Building the Browns." | Verify the main content area welcomes users with the text: "Welcome to the Browns App. This app allows the Dawg Pound to get the latest Browns news, video and live radio." | Verify the prominent "Continue" button is located at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The status bar displays the correct time and system icons. | The promotional image of a Cleveland Browns coach is visible. | The navigation bar icons are present and correctly positioned. | The "Latest Media" section displays the correct video thumbnail and title. | The main content area text is displayed correctly. | The "Continue" button is visible at the bottom of the screen.

title: Verify the "Continue" button navigates to the next screen
test_steps: Open the Cleveland Browns mobile app. | Click on the "Continue" button at the bottom of the screen. | Verify the user is navigated to the next screen.
expected_result: The user is successfully navigated to the next screen.

title: Verify the navigation bar icons are clickable
test_steps: Open the Cleveland Browns mobile app. | Click on the "Latest" icon in the navigation bar. | Click on the "Social" icon in the navigation bar. | Click on the "Fan Zone" icon in the navigation bar. | Click on the "Schedule" icon in the navigation bar. | Click on the "Tickets" icon in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the respective screen when clicking on each icon in the navigation bar.

title: Verify the "Continue" button is accessible
test_steps: Open the Cleveland Browns mobile app. | Use a screen reader to navigate to the "Continue" button. | Verify the "Continue" button is announced by the screen reader.
expected_result: The "Continue" button is announced by the screen reader.

title: Verify the "Continue" button is usable
test_steps: Open the Cleveland Browns mobile app. | Click on the "Continue" button with a finger. | Click on the "Continue" button with a stylus.
expected_result: The user is successfully navigated to the next screen when clicking on the "Continue" button.
